General.Name: Silver Mines Ltd
General.Description: Silver Mines Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of silver projects in Australia. It operates through two segments, Mining and Exploration Operations; and Agricultural Operations. The company explores for copper, gold, lead, zinc, and polymetallic deposits. Its flagship project is the Bowdens silver project, which covers an area of approximately 2,115 square kilometers located near Mudgee in the Central Tablelands Region of New South Wales. In addition, the company sells livestock and wool. Silver Mines Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
